reviews.comment:
Buen servicio, tiene todo para un buen rato y los nenes cuentan con un lindo pelotero para distraerse.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, it has everything for a good time and the kids have a nice ball pit to keep them entertained.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRd3V2X1FnEAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre impecable. Agradable estación para descansar un rato del viaje.

(Translated by Google)
Always impeccable. A pleasant stop to rest a while from your journey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNROGZlbnFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Soy Socio del ACA, y Siempre paro allí, tienen Muy Buena Atencion

(Translated by Google)
I'm a member of the ACA, and I always stop there; they have very good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURna2RUdjhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
La comida del comedor la verdad un clavo. Lo demás bien una estación de servicios normal

(Translated by Google)
The food in the cafeteria was awful. Everything else was fine, a normal service station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBcXFHOW9RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Nos sirvió de refugio para una tormenta severa.

(Translated by Google)
It served as shelter for us during a severe storm.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRd1lXVUlBEAE

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para hacer una parada intermedia sobre Ruta 2

(Translated by Google)
Good place to make a stop along Route 2
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnc2ZqLWlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Se tarda un poco para cargar nafta. Pero tiene amplio verde para descansar si viajas con mascotas. Se puede consumir adentro o afuera. Tiene instalaciones con juegos para niños. También hay una parrilla detrás.

(Translated by Google)
It takes a while to get gas. But there's plenty of green space to relax if you're traveling with pets. You can eat inside or outside. There's a children's playground. There's also a grill out back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBOWVxQU1nEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio

(Translated by Google)
Very good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3ejd2TmhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Ubicado en medio de la ruta a mar del plata. Sus combustibles son excelentes,  y como para comer es muy bueno también.

(Translated by Google)
Located on the route to Mar del Plata. Its fuel is excellent, and the food is also very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnaGNINTF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Todo normal, nada para destacar.

(Translated by Google)
Everything's normal, nothing to report.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnaS11YVpREAE

reviews.comment:
Baños limpios e incluso tienen baños más bajos para los niños.
En el exterior hay juegos para que los chicos se distraigan un rato.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are clean, and they even have lower toilets for children.
Outside, there's a playground to keep the kids entertained for a while.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRcmFESV9RRRAB
